title: decompose-apply --schema flag for plan JSON schema discoverability
definition_of_done: trls decompose-apply --schema prints a JSON Schema document (or richly annotated example) documenting all field names, types, and constraints; TestDecomposeApplySchemaFlag passes; make check green
outcome: decompose-apply --schema prints JSON Schema 2020-12 document with correct types for all plan fields; documents version as integer, scope as string (not array), dod (not definition_of_done); TestDecomposeApplySchemaFlag passes; make check green
